\hypertarget{voynich-phytoglyphica-complete-entry-listing}{%
\section{Voynich Phytoglyphica --- Complete Entry
Listing}\label{voynich-phytoglyphica-complete-entry-listing}}

Complete enumeration of all pharmaceutical and procedural entries
derived from the Voynich Manuscript (VMS) via the Imscribing Grammar
engine.

\begin{itemize}
\tightlist
\item
  \textbf{Part I --- Botanical/Pharmaceutical Entries:} 1,491
\item
  \textbf{Part II --- Procedural Recipes:} 1,076
\end{itemize}

Folio identification status: \textbf{{[}confirmed{]}} = one of 35
IG-catalogued plants; \textbf{{[}proposed{]}} = scholarly candidate
identification from medieval herbal tradition.

Fields --- Part I: folio · para · preparatio · forma · potentia ·
pars\_plantae · applicatio · volatilis · fixatio · indicatio · n\_ops
Fields --- Part II: folio · para · n\_ops · n\_steps · steps (Accipe
steps carry named botanical ingredients)

\begin{center}\rule{0.5\linewidth}{0.5pt}\end{center}
